scripts.build:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const out='Output_DoNotEdit/';const hdr='/* AUTO-GENERATED — do not edit. Source: src/*.js  Run: npm run build */
';const src=['clrUtils','clrSpaces','clrSolver','clrGen','docGen','figmaVars','config','main'].map(f=>fs.readFileSync('src/'+f+'.js','utf8')).join('
');fs.writeFileSync(out+'scripts.js',hdr+src);let html=fs.readFileSync('src/ui.html','utf8');html='<!-- AUTO-GENERATED — do not edit. Source: src/ui.html + src/*.js  Run: npm run build -->
'+html;html=html.replace(/<script src="src\/([^"]+)"><\/script>/g,(_,f)=>'<script>\n'+fs.readFileSync('src/'+f,'utf8')+'\n</script>');fs.writeFileSync(out+'ui.html',html);"
